title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF THREE MILLION PESOS AS SUBSIDY TO THE REHABILITATION OF THE PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE AND ITS MUNICIPALITIES WHICH WERE DEVASTATED BY TYPHOON LOUISE LAST NOVEMBER 19, 1964.

chunks.text:
H. No. 421 / 65 OG No. 2, 249 (January 13, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4750, June 18, 1966 ]

AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF THREE MILLION PESOS AS SUBSIDY TO THE REHABILITATION OF THE PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE AND ITS MUNICIPALITIES WHICH WERE DEVASTATED BY TYPHOON LOUISE LAST NOVEMBER 19, 1964.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sum of three million pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, as a subsidy to the rehabilitation of the Province of Surigao del Norte and its municipalities which were devastated by Typhoon Louise last November 19, 1964, graduated as follows:

For the Province of Surigao del Norte:

1.

For the fiscal year 1965-66

P500,000

2.

For the fiscal year 1966-67

400,000

3.

For the fiscal year 1967-68

300,000

4.

For the fiscal year 1968-69

200,000

5.

For the fiscal year 1969-70

100,000

P1,500,000

For the different municipalities of Surigao del Norte:

1.

For the Municipality of Surigao:

a.

For the fiscal year 1965-66

P50,000

b.

For the fiscal year 1966-67

40,000

c.

For the fiscal year 1967-68

30,000

d.

For the fiscal year 1968-69

20,000

e.

For the fiscal year 1969-70

10,000

P150,000

2.

For three fifth class municipalities:

a.

For the fiscal year 1965-66, P25,000 each

P75,000

b.

For the fiscal year 1966-67, P20,000 each

60,000

c.

45,000

P225,000

P180,000

P540.000

4.

For thirteen seventh-class municipalities:

a.

For the fiscal year 1965-66, P15,000 each

P195,000

b.

For the fiscal year 1966-67, P12,000 each

156,000

For the fiscal year 1967-68, P9,000 each

P585,000

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1966.
